divisions.name: Garments
divisions.description: Premium knit and woven apparel manufacturing.
divisions.longDescription: Our garment division is the heart of EuroAsia's operations. We have established a state-of-the-art facility that integrates every stage of garment manufacturing. From cutting and sewing to finishing and packing, our lines are optimized for efficiency, quality, and worker safety.

divisions.name: Knitting
divisions.longDescription: Our knitting division utilizes the latest machinery and modern equipment in our production process for maximum quality output. We specialize in a wide range of knit structures, providing the foundation for premium apparel brands globally.

divisions.name: Printing
divisions.description: Advanced screen and digital printing solutions.
divisions.longDescription: We offer comprehensive printing services including high-density, puff, foil, and discharge prints. Our facility is equipped with MHM automatic carousels for precision and consistency across large batches.

ceo.name: Mr. Rafiqul Islam
ceo.title: Chief Executive Officer
ceo.intro: At EUROASIA, our journey began with a simple but powerful belief — that Bangladesh's garment industry can lead the world not just in volume, but in quality and integrity.
content: Every garment that leaves our factory carries our reputation. We invest deeply in our workforce — training, welfare, and safety — because we know that great products come from great people.
To our valued buyers and partners: we are your manufacturing partner, committed to your success as much as our own.

md.name: Ms. Nusrat Jahan
md.title: Managing Director
md.intro: Leading EUROASIA as Managing Director has been a privilege. My focus has always been on operational excellence and meticulous attention to detail.
content: In today's competitive global market, what sets us apart is our culture. A culture where problems are solved proactively and deadlines are sacred.
I am particularly proud of our sustainability journey. We have reduced water consumption by 35% and transitioned to renewable energy for 40% of our operations.
